title: Fallas Lake, KY
description: <CENTRE> <SIZE:medium> FALLAS LAKE <LINE> <LINE><LEFT> <SIZE:small> There are three types of people in Fallas Lake - farmers, lake fishers, and people passing through on the way to Rosewood to the south, or Riverside to the north. <LINE> <LINE> But linger for a while in its charming streets and you may find a peace and serenity forever out of grasp in Kentucky's larger towns and cities.
